subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be God's salutations and His loving-kindness! Thou art witness, and the All-Knowing doth testify, that this Wronged One hath [addressed] the party of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلام الله و عنایته تو شاهد و عالم گواه که اینمظلوم حزب الله را
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @Manifestation of God as educator, @light and darkness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
